person.name: Natalia Andreeva
person.location: Berlin, Germany, Work authorization: Germany / EU

profile: Built and contributed to real-world applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React, including collaborative team projects with structured workflows and code reviews. Strong focus on delivering clean, user-centered interfaces, debugging issues, and improving existing features. Reliable and detail-oriented, with proven ability to learn quickly, take ownership of tasks, and contribute effectively in remote team environments.

Fixed UI bugs and ensured consistent behavior across components.

Collaborated using Git with regular code reviews and structured task management.
